violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Ice melted during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
ROP fish observed thawing with packaging still intact. PIC instructed employee to remove fish from packaging. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The presence of roaches are not controlled as evidenced by live sighting near handsink and on glueboards. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
The cold water knob located to the hand sink (3 bay sink area) was not in good repair. Knob observed loose and unable to turn on water. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

(Chicharron, pasta, beans , and fish), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC ), (Various food product ) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The presence of (flies) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
Various food product observed being stored in non food grade containers. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (stove hoods ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen prep area ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
Dish cloth were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

(Various food product) was observed held at (46-61 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The presence of (flies ) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
Various food product observed being stored in non food grade containers Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Outside refuse area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and other debris. Refuse areas must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
The (outside concrete /foundation observed is in poor repair.Observed holes and cracks. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen prep area ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
Dish cloths and spoon were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit was taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

(Beans and chicharron), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC ), ( beans and chicharron ) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The presence of (flies ) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1.food storage shelves 2.can opener base 3.all refrigeration units Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The floors and walls throughout the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen prep area ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The following physical facilities is in poor repair: 1.door frame (back area) observed with a hole. 2.outside concrete/foundation observed with holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

(Black beans), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

(Various food product ) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC ), (Black beans) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
Screen doors located in the back kitchen observed in poor repair. Screen damged/ripped. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1.food storage shelves 2.food prep shelves throughout establishment 3.shelves under steam table 4.dough mixer 5.can opener base 6.all refrigerator units New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility(including walk in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (hallway and prep area kitchen ) do not have coving.Coving observed detaching from wall. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The following physical observed in poor repair:1.door frame(back area) observed with a hole2.wall above 3 bay sink has drywall material3.outside foundation/concrete observed with holes.4.hallway wall observed material/covering detaching from wall.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

A sanitizer bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Handsink cleared during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

The presence of flies are not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

The walls and floor drains throughout the establishment has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

Soup, pasta, etc. were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The presence of rodents and flies are not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings, presence and live activity (flies). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility (kitchen, bar areas) have an accumulation of flies, soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2023
